dismissalText.commentary: Priyansh Arya b Chahar 22 (17b 4x4 0x6 25m) SR: 129.41

dismissalComment.html: zing bails go flying, and Chahar breaks through! Back of a length, pitching outside off and coming in with the angle. Arya has a slog at it but seems to be early on the stroke. Might have been a knuckle ball, which explains why Arya was through the shot early. The ball crashes into the top of middle and leg, and Arya has to go!

dismissalText.commentary: Cooper Connolly b Bawa 21 (22b 2x4 1x6 35m) SR: 95.45

dismissalComment.html: stumps rattled again, and PBKS are falling apart! Hard length on middle and leg, and this skips through. Connolly looks to force the issue through the off side but is late on the stroke. Beaten for pace and the ball breezes past the outside edge before thumping into the top of off. Bawa with a muted celebration, and PBKS lose their fourth!

dismissalText.commentary: Shreyas Iyer b Thakur 4 (2b 1x4 0x6 2m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: Pat Cummins would be proud of that! 132ks length ball angles in, lands on off stump and straightens despite being a cross-seamer to kiss top of off. Add 10ks to that and that's Cummins to Root from 2019. Four off the stumps to deep-third boundary. Shreyas was in the crease and looked to defend to cover, played the line and missed it, instinctively took off for the run only to turn back and see the bails missing.

dismissalText.commentary: Suryansh Shedge c Bawa b Thakur 8 (5b 0x4 1x6 12m) SR: 160

dismissalComment.html: oh, what a stunning grab, and Shardul, just like that, has three! Full and slanting into the pads. Shedge laces his flick but the only problem is he hits it in the air and too close to Bawa at mid wicket. The youngster flies to his left and makes it stick. Shedge cannot believe it and MI, who began the night by dropping a sitter, have now taken a sharp catch to pile further misery on PBKS!

dismissalText.commentary: Shashank Singh lbw b Bosch 2 (3b 0x4 0x6 13m) SR: 66.66

dismissalComment.html: rapped on the pad, and given! Shashank reviews! Back of a length in the channel and this decks back in, while also keeping a little low. Shashank, hopping around his crease, misses it. He might have a prayer, though, because the impact may have been outside the line. There is a spike on UltraEdge before the ball hits the pad but the bat is not close enough to the ball at that moment. Umpire's Call on Impact, and Ball Tracking has the ball crashing into the top of off. Shashank has to go, and Bosch has his first wicket for the evening!

dismissalText.commentary: Azmatullah Omarzai c Jacks b Chahar 38 (17b 2x4 4x6 26m) SR: 223.52

dismissalComment.html: chipped to long on, and Omarzai's party is over! Full toss on off and this is there to be hit too. Ought to have been thumped into the mountains but Omarzai does not get under it enough. Hits it flat and hits it straight to long on. A very handy cameo, but someone else will have to shepherd this innings now!

dismissalText.commentary: Marco Jansen b Thakur 2 (7b 0x4 0x6 10m) SR: 28.57

dismissalComment.html: another nip-backer, and Jansen is outta here too! This one, like the ball that got Shashank, also keeps low. Shortish outside off and Jansen's eyes light up. He thinks he can swat this over cow corner but the lack of bounce and the inward nip means his stumps are exposed. Ball ends up hitting middle stump two-thirds of the way up, and Shardul has four!
